message:
style: apply clippy single_char_pattern and format_args_uses lint fixes

Modernize string operations and print macros across the codebase:

Console tests:
- Replace contains(&str) with contains(char) for single-character checks
- More efficient: avoids creating temporary &str slices

Sync module:
- Use inline format arguments (format_args style) in test println! macros
- Cleaner: println!("[TEST] Iteration {i}") vs println!("... {}", i)

Traceback tests:
- Same contains(char) optimization for line number assertions

These are all clippy lint fixes with no behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
